response: Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, so he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many as Sophia, so Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Together, they collected 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. Each batch sold for $5, so they made 8 * 5 = $40. They used all their blueberries to make muffins.
